name: How do I know if my settlement offer is fair for crushed fingers?
description: Compare impairment rating × state multiplier × wages. Lawyer calculates true value vs. insurance "lowball."

mainEntity.name: How do I know if my settlement offer is fair for crushed fingers?

acceptedAnswer.text: Compare impairment rating × state multiplier × wages. Lawyer calculates true value vs. insurance "lowball."
